channel.title: Loopback Social — Community News
channel.description: Events and announcements shared across the Loopback Social community network.

item.title: UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29!
item.description: UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29! Event: 2026-08-29T00:00:00.000Z — 2026-08-29T08:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: Replay videos for .NET Universe 2026 are being released in sequence. Check the event page for updates.

item.title: Submit news or community links! Click here to let us know.
